sentences.arabic: تَتَجَلَّى عَظَمَةُ الصِّدِّيقِ أَبِي بَكْرٍ رَضِيَ اللهُ عَنْهُ فِي مَوَاقِفِهِ الْحَاسِمَةِ الَّتِي بَرْهَنَتْ عَلَى عُمْقِ إِيمَانِهِ وَتَفَانِيهِ فِي نُصْرَةِ الإِسْلَامِ.
sentences.translation: Veličina Siddiqa, Ebu Bekra, radijallahu anhu, ogleda se u njegovim odlučnim stavovima koji su dokazali dubinu njegovog imana i požrtvovnost u potpomaganju islama.
sentences.translationEn: The greatness of al-Siddiq, Abu Bakr (may Allah be pleased with him), is manifested in his decisive stances that proved the depth of his faith and his selflessness in supporting Islam.

sentences.arabic: فَقَدْ كَانَ أَوَّلَ مَنِ اسْتَجَابَ لِدَعْوَةِ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ دُونَ تَرَدُّدٍ، وَبَذَلَ مَالَهُ كُلَّهُ فِي سَبِيلِ اللهِ حَتَّى لَمْ يَتْرُكْ لِأَهْلِهِ إِلَّا اللهَ وَرَسُولَهُ.
sentences.translation: On je bio prvi koji se bez oklijevanja odazvao pozivu Vjerovjesnika, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, i udijelio je sav svoj imetak na Allahovom putu, tako da porodici nije ostavio ništa osim Allaha i Njegovog Poslanika.
sentences.translationEn: He was the first to respond to the Prophet's call (peace be upon him) without hesitation, and he spent all his wealth in the cause of Allah until he left nothing for his family except Allah and His Messenger.

sentences.arabic: وَفِي رِحْلَةِ الْهِجْرَةِ الْمُبَارَكَةِ، ضَرَبَ أَرْوَعَ الأَمْثِلَةِ فِي الْوَفَاءِ وَالْفِدَاءِ، حَيْثُ رَافَقَ الْمُصْطَفَى فِي الْغَارِ وَحَمَاهُ بِنَفْسِهِ.
sentences.translation: Tokom blagoslovljene Hidžre, pružio je najljepše primjere vjernosti i žrtvovanja, prateći Izabranika u pećini i štiteći ga svojim životom.
sentences.translationEn: During the blessed Hijrah journey, he set the finest examples of loyalty and sacrifice, accompanying the Chosen One in the cave and protecting him with his own life.

sentences.arabic: وَقَدْ شَهِدَ لَهُ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ بِالْمَنْزِلَةِ الرَّفِيعَةِ، حَيْثُ أَخْبَرَ أَنَّهُ لَوْ كَانَ مُتَّخِذًا خَلِيلًا مِنْ أُمَّتِهِ لَاتَّخَذَ أَبَا بَكْرٍ خَلِيلًا [أَخْرَجَهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ فَضَائِلِ الصَّحَابَةِ].
sentences.translation: Vjerovjesnik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, posvjedočio je njegov visoki položaj, rekavši da bi, kada bi uzimao prisnog prijatelja (halila) iz svog ummeta, uzeo Ebu Bekra za prisnog prijatelja [Bilježi Buhari u Knjizi o odlikama ashaba].
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet (peace be upon him) testified to his high status, stating that if he were to take a bosom friend (khalil) from his nation, he would have taken Abu Bakr as a bosom friend [Recorded by al-Bukhari in the Book of the Virtues of the Companions].

sentences.arabic: وَيُؤَكِّدُ شَيْخُ الإِسْلَامِ ابْنُ تَيْمِيَّةَ أَنَّ مَكَانَةَ أَبِي بَكْرٍ هِيَ الأَعْلَى بَيْنَ الصَّحَابَةِ لِمَا قَامَ فِي قَلْبِهِ مِنَ التَّصْدِيقِ الْجَازِمِ وَالْمَحَبَّةِ الصَّادِقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Šejhul-islam Ibn Taymiyyah potvrđuje da je Ebu Bekrovo mjesto najviše među ashabima zbog nepokolebljivog uvjerenja i iskrene ljubavi koja se nastanila u njegovom srcu.
sentences.translationEn: Shaykh al-Islam Ibn Taymiyyah confirms that Abu Bakr's rank is the highest among the Companions due to the firm conviction and sincere love that resided in his heart.

sentences.arabic: لَقَدْ كَانَ رَجُلَ الشَّدَائِدِ، فَحِينَ ارْتَدَّتْ بَعْضُ الْقَبَائِلِ بَعْدَ وَفَاةِ النَّبِيِّ، وَقَفَ كَالطَّوْدِ الشَّامِخِ حَامِيًا لِحِمَى الدِّينِ وَمُثَبِّتًا لِأَرْكَانِ الدَّوْلَةِ.
sentences.translation: Bio je čovjek za teška vremena; kada su se neka plemena odmetnula nakon Vjerovjesnikove smrti, stajao je poput čvrste planine, braneći granice vjere i učvršćujući temelje države.
sentences.translationEn: He was a man for hardships; when some tribes apostatized after the Prophet's death, he stood like a towering mountain, guarding the sanctuary of religion and stabilizing the pillars of the state.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ سِيرَتَهُ تَعْلِيمٌ لِلأَجْيَالِ فِي مَعْنَى الثَّبَاتِ عَلَى الْمَبْدَأِ وَالِانْصِيَاعِ لِلْحَقِّ مَهْمَا غَلَتِ التَّضْحِيَاتُ.
sentences.translation: Njegova biografija je lekcija generacijama o značenju postojanosti na principima i pokornosti istini bez obzira na veličinu žrtve.
sentences.translationEn: His biography is a lesson for generations in the meaning of steadfastness to principles and compliance with the truth, regardless of the sacrifices.

sentences.arabic: فَلَمْ يَكُنْ أَبُو بَكْرٍ مُجَرَّدَ صَاحِبٍ، بَلْ كَانَ الرُّوحَ الرَّدِيفَةَ لِلنَّبِيِّ فِي كُلِّ مَحْفَلٍ.
sentences.translation: Ebu Bekr nije bio samo ashab, već duša pratilja Vjerovjesniku na svakom mjestu.
sentences.translationEn: Abu Bakr was not merely a companion, but the kindred spirit to the Prophet in every assembly.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الِاقْتِدَاءَ بِأَبِي بَكْرٍ يَعْنِي التَّمَسُّكَ بِالسُّنَّةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ وَتَقْدِيمَ مَحَبَّةِ اللهِ عَلَى كُلِّ مَحْبُوبٍ.
sentences.translation: Slijediti Ebu Bekra znači držati se sunneta i pretpostaviti ljubav prema Allahu svakoj drugoj ljubavi.
sentences.translationEn: Following Abu Bakr means adhering to the Prophetic Sunnah and prioritizing the love of Allah over all else.

sentences.arabic: وَفِي هَذَا تَتَجَسَّدُ حَقِيقَةُ الْوَلَاءِ وَالْبَرَاءِ الَّتِي هِيَ أَصْلٌ مِنْ أُصُولِ الْعَقِيدَةِ.
sentences.translation: U tome se utjelovljuje istina o lojalnosti i odricanju (al-wala' wa al-bara'), što je jedan od temelja akide.
sentences.translationEn: In this, the reality of loyalty and disavowal (al-wala' wa al-bara'), which is a fundamental of the creed, is embodied.

sentences.arabic: فَرَضِيَ اللهُ عَنِ الصِّدِّيقِ وَأَرْضَاهُ، وَجَعَلَنَا مِمَّنْ يَسِيرُونَ عَلَى نَهْجِهِ الْقَوِيمِ.
sentences.translation: Allah bio zadovoljan Siddiqom i učinio ga zadovoljnim, i učinio nas od onih koji hode njegovim ispravnim putem.
sentences.translationEn: May Allah be pleased with al-Siddiq and make him pleased, and make us among those who walk upon his upright path.
